prepared_text:
Cochin Shipyard Limited 
Q1FY21 Earnings Call 
Invites you to discuss the company’s Q1FY21 results and the road ahead 
Monday, 17th August, 2020 at 04:00 P.M. IST 
Cochin Shipyard Limited, a forerunner in the Indian Shipbuilding & Ship Repair 
industry, will organize a conference call for investors and analysts on Monday, 
August 17, 2020 at 04:00 P.M. IST to discuss the company’s Q1FY21 financial 
performance. 
Shri Madhu S Nair, Chairman & Managing Director, Shri V J Jose, Director 
(Finance), Shri Rajesh Gopalakrishnan, General Manager (Business Development 
& New Projects), Shri Shibu John, Deputy General Manager (Finance) and Shri 
Syamkamal N, Company Secretary will represent Cochin Shipyard Limited on the 
call. 
The financial results, declared on August 10, 2020, are available in the Company’s 
website (www.cochinshipyard.com) and on the websites of the National Stock 
Exchange 
of 
India 
Limited 
(www.nseindia.com) 
and 
BSE 
Limited 
(www.bseindia.com) 
 
DETAILS OF THE CONFERENCE CALL 
Timing 
04:00 P.M. IST on August 17, 2020 
Conference dial-in Primary number 
+91 22 6280 1341 / +91 22 7115 8242 
Local Access Number 
+91-7045671221 
Hong Kong Toll Free Number 
800964448 
Singapore  Toll Free Number 
8001012045 
UK Toll Free Number 
08081011573 
USA Toll Free Number 
 
18667462133 

 
 
About Cochin Shipyard Limited 
 
Cochin Shipyard Limited (CSL) was incorporated in the year 1972 as a fully owned Government 
of India Company. At present the Government of India holds 72.86% in the equity share capital 
of the Company. In the last four decades, the Company has emerged as a forerunner in the 
Indian shipbuilding & ship repair industry and also a well-known player on the global 
shipbuilding front. CSL has exported 45 ships to various commercial clients outside India such as 
National Petroleum Construction Company (Abu Dhabi), the Clipper Group (Bahamas), Vroon 
Offshore (Netherlands) and SIGBA AS (Norway). 
 
The Company has built and repaired some of the largest ships in India and is presently building 
the prestigious Indigenous Aircraft Carrier for the Indian Navy. Over the years, CSL has 
successfully responded to fluctuations in the shipbuilding requirements of the markets and 
have evolved from building bulk carriers to smaller and more technically sophisticated vessels 
such as Platform Supply Vessel (PSV) and Anchor Handling Tug Supply Vessels (AHTS). CSL has 
worked with several leading technology firms in the industry including Rolls Royce Marine 
(Norway), GTT (France), Vard Group (Norway) etc. This has added to CSL’s credibility in the 
international markets. CSL’s key shipbuilding clients on the domestic front include the Indian 
Navy, the Indian Cost Guard and the Shipping Corporation of India Limited. CSL has also 
undertaken repairs of various types of vessels including upgradation of ships of the oil 
exploration industry as well as periodical maintenance, repairs and life extension of ships. CSL is 
presently one of the best performing shipyards in India. 
 
 
For more information contact: 
 
Shri Syamkamal N (Company Secretary)    
 
Shri Gaurav Girdhar 
Cochin Shipyard Limited 
 
 
Concept Investor Relations 
 
Tel: +91 484 2501306   
 
 
Tel: +91 7798232425  
Fax: +91 (484) 238400                               
 
 
Email: gaurav.g@conceptpr.com 
E-mail: syam.kamal@cochinshipyard.com 
 
 
 
CIN:  L63032KL1972GOI002414 
Regd. Oﬃce: Administrative Building, Cochin Shipyard Premises, Perumanoor, Kochi – 682015, Kerala, India. 
Phone: +91 (484) 2501306;  Fax No.: +91 (484) 2384001 
Email: secretary@cochinshipyard.com;  Website: www.cochinshipyard.com
